_comment: Claude Code (the CLI) stores MCP servers in ~/.claude.json under the `mcpServers` key,
or per-project in <project>/.mcp.json. You can edit those JSON files directly, or
claude mcp add --transport http catetus https://mcp.catetus.com \
=== Option 2: local stdio (free + paid via env) ===
# paid tier: also set the key via -e
claude mcp add catetus -e CATETUS_API_KEY=cat_live_REPLACE_ME -- npx -y @catetus/mcp@latest
=== Option 3: edit ~/.claude.json directly with the block below ===
FREE TIER (stdio, no key): analyze, list_presets, list_scenes, get_scene,
PAID TIER (key set): all of the above + encode, score_fidelity, repack,

catetus._comment: FREE + PAID via stdio. Omit the env block to use the free tier.

catetus-hosted-disabled._comment: Alternative: hosted HTTP, no local Node required. Paid only. Rename this key to `catetus` and delete the stdio entry above to use this one.
